headline: A Look At Expand Energy (EXE) Valuation After Its Recent Rebrand And Share Price Weakness
summary: Expand Energy (EXE) is drawing attention after a recent name change from Chesapeake Energy Corporation. The company has shifted its brand while keeping its focus on U.S. natural gas production across major shale basins. See our latest analysis for Expand Energy. Despite the rebrand, recent trading has been softer, with a 30 day share price return of an 11.04% decline and a year to date share price return of a 13.03% decline, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 157.48% still reflects...
